# Repolis

> Repolis is a single-file 3D "city of repos" web app: every public GitHub repo of its owner becomes a walkable low-poly house whose height, width, ornaments and night-glow are built from real traffic (visitors, clones, forks, views) — not stars. An LLM "taxi" and star-named scholar NPCs answer questions in natural language and drive you to any repo. It runs from one `index.html` with no build step; optional Cloudflare Workers add grounded AI and realtime multiplayer.

Key facts for an AI agent:
- One static `index.html` (Three.js r0.160, ~5.2k lines), zero build, no `package.json`.
- Data lives in `repos.json` (generated by `scripts/build_repos.py`; never hand-edited).
- Live AI is the `repolis-taxi` Cloudflare Worker in `cloudflare-taxi/`; a fresh clone falls back to keyless Local search with no backend.
- Deploy the site by pushing `main` → GitHub Pages. Verify with `node council/test.mjs` and `node council/test-live.mjs`.
- Read `AGENTS.md` first for the full operating contract and hard rules.

## Start here (agent onboarding)

- [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md): The operating manual — run, rebuild, deploy, verify, and the hard rules. Read this first.
- [repolis.yaml](repolis.yaml): Machine-readable manifest — entry points, runtimes, deploy targets, endpoints.
- [docs/domain-model.md](docs/domain-model.md): The data & feature model — repo→building mapping, ranking score, NPCs, town modes.
- [docs/known-limitations.md](docs/known-limitations.md): What is intentionally not supported (so you don't chase dead ends).
- [examples/](examples/): Copy-paste recipes — curl the worker, share-link a town, embed the city.

## Code

- [index.html](index.html): The whole app — 3D engine, UI, taxi, scholars, i18n, day/night.
- [scholars.js](scholars.js): `window.SCHOLARS` roster (POLARIS · VEGA · RIGEL), a classic no-build script.
- [scripts/build_repos.py](scripts/build_repos.py): Regenerates `repos.json` from traffic logs + `gh api`.
- [cloudflare-taxi/src/grounded.js](cloudflare-taxi/src/grounded.js): The live grounding Worker (KB retrieval + in-persona chat).
- [council/](council/): The Kronos Council deterministic decision engine and its hermetic tests.

## Docs

- [README.md](README.md): Human-facing overview (English).
- [README.ko.md](README.ko.md): Human-facing overview (한국어).
- [SCHOLARS.md](SCHOLARS.md): The scholar-NPC roster, in prose.
- [cloudflare-taxi/README.md](cloudflare-taxi/README.md): Grounding Worker setup, secrets, and rationale.
- [CHANGELOG.md](CHANGELOG.md): What shipped, newest first.
- [COUNCIL_PATTERN.md](COUNCIL_PATTERN.md): The multi-agent debate → judge pattern behind the Council.

## Live

- [Repolis (live demo)](https://hyeonsangjeon.github.io/Repolis/): The deployed city on GitHub Pages.
- [Any user's town](https://hyeonsangjeon.github.io/Repolis/?user=mrdoob): Append `?user=<login>` to build a town from any public GitHub user's repos.
